  ?edition wdt:P3450 wd:Q178750 .
  ?edition wdt:P1346 wd:Q83459 .
  ?edition wdt:P585 ?time .
}
ORDER BY ?time
LIMIT 1

question: What is the country of orign of the Godzilla vs. Kong movie
how many goals did Cristiano Ronaldo scored in fifa club world cup
sparql:
SELECT(SUM(xsd:integer(?goals)) AS ?totalGoals) WHERE {
  wd:Q11571 p:P1344 ?participation .
  ?participation ps:P1344 ?event .
  ?participation pq:P1351 ?goals .
  ?event rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , "club world cup") && LANG(?label) = "en")
  FILTER(xsd:integer(?goals) > 0)
}

sparql:
SELECT ?director ?directorLabel WHERE {
  VALUES ?movie {
    wd:Q429934 wd:Q471976 wd:Q1342850
  }
  ?movie wdt:P57 ?director .
  ?movie rdfs:label ?movieLabel
  FILTER(LANG(?movieLabel) = 'en')
  .
  ?director rdfs:label ?directorLabel
  FILTER(LANG(?directorLabel) = 'en')
  .
  ?movie wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
}
GROUP BY ?director ?directorLabel
ORDER BY MIN(?releaseDate)
LIMIT 3

What is the form of creative work of the  Hellbound  television show
What is the name of the narrator of the series Gossip Girl
sparql:
SELECT ?narratorLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q199853 p:P161 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P161 ?narrator .
  ?narrator rdfs:label ?narratorLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?narratorLabel) = "en")
  .
  ?statement pq:P453 ?role .
  ?role rdfs:label ?roleLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?roleLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?roleLabel) , "gossip girl") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?roleLabel) , "narrator"))
  .
}

sparql:
SELECT ?book ?title WHERE {
  wd:Q478016 wdt:P577 ?lighthouseDate .
  ?book wdt:P50 wd:Q40909 ; wdt:P31 wd:Q7725634 ; wdt:P577 ?date ; wdt:P1476 ?title .
  FILTER(?date > ?lighthouseDate)
  FILTER(LANG(?title) = 'en')
}
ORDER BY ASC(?date)
LIMIT 1
